query_basis: Reviewed live official Missouri DESE School Directory page, public ArcGIS app config, and exact district layer instead of the older broken SSRS bridge.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live official page is titled School Directory and exposes the Missouri Public School Directory ArcGIS map plus direct School Directory by County and School Directory by District downloads.

samples.sample_name: Missouri Public School Directory ArcGIS app
samples.evidence_snippet: The public ArcGIS app config is open and labels the application Missouri Public School Directory.
The live district layer is named Public School Districts and exposes fields including DIST_NAME, DIST_CODE, DADDRESS_1, DCITY_1, DZIP_1, COUNTY, DPHONE_1, DIEMAIL, and URL.
A bounded distinct-value query on COUNTY returns 115 Missouri counties, from Adair through Wright.
Sample official rows include Adair Co. R-II in Adair County, Liberty 53 in Clay County, and Ferguson-Florissant R-II in St. Louis County, each with address, phone, district email, and website fields.

Reviewed 2026-06-21 live probe returned the exact Missouri Youth Services leaf with explicit Pre-Employment Transition Services (pre-ETS) language and student-disability routing.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-22 browser-assisted exact first-party Missouri Parents Act / MPACT captures now preserve both statewide contact routing and explicit PTI designation evidence, so the old low-token 403 challenge is no longer the terminal truth for this family.

samples.evidence_snippet: Reviewed 2026-06-22 browser-assisted exact first-party capture of the MPACT homepage. The live page preserves the visible phone 800.743.7634, email info@missouriparentsact.org, and the mission text "Empowering Families to advocate for themselves so that children with special education needs can reach their full potential in education and life."

Reviewed 2026-06-22 browser-assisted exact first-party capture of the MPACT About Us leaf. The live page states "We have been Missouri’s federally-funded Parent Training and Information Center since 1988."
